sources.name: Google Scholar
sources.query: All phases — primary broad academic search engine

sources.name: Semantic Scholar
sources.query: Phases 1–3 — citation-graph traversal and related-paper recommendations

sources.name: arXiv (cs.GT + cs.MA + cs.AI)
sources.query: Phases 1, 2, 3, 5 — game theory, multi-agent systems, AI preprints

sources.name: PubMed / PubMed Central
sources.query: Phase 2 — calibrated memory decay and interference models from cognitive psychology

sources.name: SSRN (Economics / Game Theory)
sources.query: Phases 1, 4, 6 — contest design, bounded rationality welfare, mechanism design working papers

sources.name: ACM Digital Library
sources.query: Phase 5 — MARL in game environments, exploitability metrics (EC, AAMAS, AAAI proceedings)

sources.name: GitHub (OpenSpiel / PettingZoo)
sources.query: Phase 5 — existing MARL environments for elimination/sequential games; PSRO implementations

sources.name: JSTOR
sources.query: Phases 1, 3 — classic sequential-decision and information-value papers (Econometrica, AER, GEB)

sources.name: Econometrica / Games and Economic Behavior archives
sources.query: Phases 1, 2, 3 — foundational sequential game theory, information value, contest theory

sources.name: Journal of Mathematical Psychology
sources.query: Phase 2 — formal memory models with calibrated parameters (decay curves, interference functions)

sources.name: Netflix / Devil's Plan S1 primary source
sources.query: Cross-cutting — exact rules, observed player strategies, elimination sequences for Fragments of Memory episodes

sources.name: NeurIPS / ICML proceedings (OpenReview)
sources.query: Phase 5 — recent PSRO variants, MARL convergence results, exploitability bounds

sources.name: Connected Papers
sources.query: All phases — visual citation-graph exploration from seed papers to find missed related work

sources.name: Psychological Review / Psych Bulletin
sources.query: Phase 2 — authoritative reviews of forgetting curves (Wixted 2004, Averell & Heathcote 2011) and interference theory

sources.name: DBLP Computer Science Bibliography
sources.query: Phase 5 — author-based search for MARL/game-solving researchers (Lanctot, Lockhart, Hennes et al.)
